title: BUILT TO RUN.
NOT TO PITCH.
hero.intro: Metafloor builds products that generate revenue. Not decks. Not demos. Revenue.

sections.title: WE DON'T DO THEATER.
sections.body: Most AI studios build something impressive and spend the next six months explaining why it doesn't work yet. We skip that part. We build what works, ship it, and let the results speak.

sections.title: FOUNDED ON PRODUCTION.
sections.body: Started in Dhanbad. Tata Steel ecosystem gave us access to real industrial problems — factory floors, mining operations, enterprise sales cycles. We learned what breaks when money is actually on the line.

sections.title: THE PRODUCTS ARE THE PROOF.
sections.body: ORACLE runs live prediction signals. OUTBOUND books real meetings. SHADOW is in beta for serious investors. Each one shipped because something had to work — not because a deck needed to look good.
